channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Jelly Bundle
item.description: A compilation of tweaks for the Swamp Jelly server.

item.title: Tethys Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for a personal private server.

item.title: aged wood fix
item.description: fixes aged wood textures path

item.title: Zenith: Assimilation
item.description: Forge your path to Apotheosis. Consume Creatures, take their traits and become the ultimate lifeform

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: ClickLock (Accessibility Mod)
item.description: Adds accessibility features to lock mouse clicks (Auto-Click/Hold) with customizable settings

item.title: Antique Harmony | Music Additions / Alternative Soundtrack
item.description: Adds to/replaces soundtrack with original orchestral one, written for the game.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Animalica - Compatibility
item.description: Adds a small list of modded animals as players!

item.title: CompostTweak
item.description: Makes composting alot more interactive and adds more things to compost.

item.title: Hydrate or Diedrate
item.description: A mod that adds thirst and hydration mechanics as well as hot weather survival.

item.title: Cool Weapons Pack
item.description: A mod where I just add weapons I think are cool and friends have requested. It should be CO compat

item.title: [Infinitum] Trader Editor
item.description: A graphical editor for individual vanilla traders. Customize each trader directly in-game.

item.title: Burdened
item.description: A weightier carrying experience: customizable slots, immersive carrying, server-enforced, and more.

item.title: Aged Wood Restore
item.description: Aged Wood Restore Repairs worlds broken by the MaterialNeeds 1.x → 2.0.0 transition.

item.title: Temporal Convergence
item.description: Expands the creatures emerging from temporal rifts with new eldritch entities, afflicted automatons,

item.title: Electric Shield Quiver Compat
item.description: Add missing tag to electric shield for compatability

item.title: Server Debugger
item.description: Server-side diagnostics for main thread stalls, GC pauses, and managed memory leaks.

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Smithing Plus_1.9.0-rc1_hotfix
item.description: General hotfix for 1.9.0-rc.1, addressing chisel delay, iron bloom stutters, and lag spikes/crashes

item.title: Astria Porta Sounds
item.description: Adds Stargate sounds to Astria Porta's Stargates

item.title: RebornClassTweak
item.description: class fix

item.title: More Lanterns
item.description: Adds a variety of decorative and useful lanterns

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Animalica - Hooved Animals
item.description: Adds all the hooved animals as playable models!

item.title: Animalica - Bears
item.description: Adds Bears as player choices

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: Animalica Core
item.description: Core mod for playable animals. Does nothing on it's own
